steps.title: Mataki na farko: Niyya da Ihram
steps.details:
• Ku yi niyyar yin Umra, ku shiga Ihrami a Miqat, sannan ku fara Talbiyah.
  • Ya yi biyayya ga haramcin Ihram, kuma ya kammala tsarkakewar kafin fara ibadar.
steps.evidence: Quran 2:196 da shekarar fara ibada daga Miqat.
steps.referenceLabel: Jagorar Ziyarar Ma'aikatar Umrah da Umara

steps.title: Mataki na Biyu: Shiga Al-Masjid Al-Haram
steps.details:
• Shiga cikin nutsuwa, da addu'a da tawali'u.
  • Fara daga gefen da ke sauƙaƙa zirga-zirga cikin jama'a lafiya, sannan ka nufi yankin Tawaf.
steps.evidence: Jagororin annabci gabaɗaya kan ɗabi'u a masallatai da kuma sauƙaƙa ibada.
steps.referenceLabel: Cibiyar Wayar da Kan Masu Hidima

steps.title: Mataki na uku: Tawaf (da'irori bakwai)
steps.details:
• Yi Tawaf a kewayen Kaabah sau bakwai, fara daga layin Black Stone.
  • Ci gaba da tunawa da Allah kuma ku guji cutar da wasu a cikin taron jama'a.
  • Shawara: Yi amfani da manhajar Apple Watch don taimaka maka ƙididdige da'irar Tawaf ɗinka.
  • Shawara: Yi amfani da manhajar Wear OS da ke kan agogonka don taimaka maka ƙididdige da'irar Tawaf ɗinka.
steps.evidence: Quran 22:29 da kuma bayanin da aka rubuta game da dawafin Annabi.

steps.title: Mataki na Huɗu: Addu'a bayan Tawaf
steps.details: • A yi sallah raka'a biyu bayan kammala Tawaf idan zai yiwu ba tare da cutar da jama'a ba, sannan a ci gaba da shan ruwan Zamzam cikin tsari.
steps.evidence: An kafa ta a cikin ingantattun hadisai game da addu'a bayan Tawaf.
steps.referenceLabel: Jagorar Ziyarar Ma'aikatar Umrah da Umara

steps.title: Mataki na biyar: Saie tsakanin Safa da Marwah
steps.details:
• Yi Saie don zagaye bakwai tsakanin Safa da Marwah, farawa daga Safa kuma ƙare a Marwah, da addu'a da tunawa.
  • Shawara: Yi amfani da manhajar Apple Watch don taimaka maka ka ƙididdige guduwar Saie.
  • Shawara: Yi amfani da manhajar Wear OS da ke kan agogonka don taimaka maka ka ƙididdige gudu Saie.
steps.evidence: Quran 2:158 da ingantattun ruwayoyi bisa ga umarnin manzon.

steps.title: Mataki na shida: Aski ko aski
steps.details:
• Maza suna aske ko aske gashin kansu, mata kuma suna aske gashin kansu kaɗan.
  • Kuma da wannan ne Umrah ta ƙare kuma Ihram ta ƙare.
steps.evidence: Quran 48:27 da ingantattun ruwayoyi da suka shafi aski da rage kiba.
steps.referenceLabel: Jagorar Ziyarar Ma'aikatar Umrah da Umara

steps.title: Mataki na farko: Ihram da niyyar Hajji
steps.details:
• Shiga ihrami a Miqat, ka yi niyyar yin aikin Hajjinka, sannan ka ci gaba da Talbiyah.
  • Ka bi ƙa'idodin Ihram har sai ka isa ƙofar Ihram.
steps.evidence: Quran 2:196 da kuma ayyukan annabci da aka amince da su don fara aikin Hajji.

steps.title: Mataki na Biyu: Yawm at-Tarwiyah a Mina
steps.details: • A ranar takwas ga Dhul Hijjah, ku tafi Mina, ku yi addu'o'i a lokutan da aka kayyade, sannan ku shirya domin tunawa Arafah ta hanyar ruhaniya da dabaru.
steps.evidence: Jerin al'adu da aka rubuta a cikin tafiyar bankwana.

steps.title: Mataki na uku: Tsayuwa a Arafah
steps.details:
• Ku yi ranar tara ga watan Dhul Hijjah a Arafah kuna addu'a, kuna ambaton Allah, kuma kuna tuba.
  • Wannan shine ginshiƙin aikin Hajji mai muhimmanci.

steps.title: Mataki na huɗu: Muzdalifah da tattara duwatsu
steps.details: • Bayan faɗuwar rana, je Muzdalifah, yi sallar Maghrib da Isha, ka kwana a can, sannan ka tattara duwatsu don jifan Mina.
steps.evidence: Jerin annabci bayan Arafah a cikin ingantattun ruwayoyi.

steps.title: Mataki na Biyar: Rami, Hadaya, da Waƙa
steps.details: • A ranar Idi, lokacin jifan dutsen Jamarat al-Aqabah, yi hadaya inda ya cancanta, sannan a aske ko a yanka gashinka don yin tahlil na farko.
steps.evidence: Quran 22:36-37 da kuma jerin ingantattun hadisai.

steps.title: Mataki na shida: Tawaf al-Ifadah (zagaye bakwai)
steps.details:
• Komawa Makka don yin Tawaf al-Ifadah, kammala da'irori bakwai, da kuma kiyaye lafiya da tsari a lokutan aiki.
  • Shawara: Yi amfani da manhajar Apple Watch don taimaka maka ƙididdige da'irar Tawaf ɗinka.
  • Shawara: Yi amfani da manhajar Wear OS da ke kan agogonka don taimaka maka ƙididdige da'irar Tawaf ɗinka.
steps.evidence: Quran 22:29 da kuma bayanin da aka rubuta game da dawafi na wajibi.

steps.title: Mataki na 7: Faɗa wa mutumin da ake buƙata
steps.details:
• Yi Saie a lokacin da nau'in aikin Hajjinka ya buƙaci haka, yayin da kake kiyaye jerin da adadin da'irori bakwai tsakanin Safa da Marwah.
  • Shawara: Yi amfani da manhajar Apple Watch don taimaka maka ka ƙididdige guduwar Saie.
  • Shawara: Yi amfani da manhajar Wear OS da ke kan agogonka don taimaka maka ka ƙididdige gudu Saie.
steps.evidence: Quran 2:158 da kuma aikace-aikacensa na shari'a a cikin ayyukan Hajji.

steps.title: Mataki na 8: Ayyam at-Tashriq da Tawaf al-Wada'
steps.details:
• Zama a Mina a lokacin Tashreeq don yin ibadar jifan Jamarat, sannan a kammala Tawaf al-Wada' kafin a bar Makka, sai dai waɗanda aka keɓe.
  • Shawara: Yi amfani da manhajar Apple Watch don taimaka maka ƙididdige da'irar Tawaf ɗinka.
  • Shawara: Yi amfani da manhajar Wear OS da ke kan agogonka don taimaka maka ƙididdige da'irar Tawaf ɗinka.
steps.evidence: An kafa al'adun ne bisa jagorancin Quran da kuma aiki da Sunnah Annabi mai tsarki daidai.
